# My Projects

Some introductory text about projects.

## Project Alpha

Project Alpha is a web application built with React and FastAPI.
It handles user authentication and real-time data processing.
Technologies used: Python, JavaScript, PostgreSQL, Docker.

## Project Beta

Project Beta is a machine learning pipeline for sentiment analysis.
It processes customer reviews and generates insights.
Technologies used: Python, scikit-learn, pandas, AWS Lambda.
